page_content:
SURFICIAL GEOLOGY MINOR

Program Director: John Merck, Ph.D.

This undergraduate minor recognizes concentrated study in Surﬁcial Geology, a designated ﬁeld in the College of Computer, Mathematical, and Natural Sciences. The award of a minor will be noted on the student's transcript at the time of graduation.

This minor may be earned by students not majoring in Geology and are administered by the Geology Undergraduate Studies Director. A grade of "C-" or better must be earned in all courses required for the minor.
